text: business_entity.customer_order Customer Order Confirmed customer purchase that can later be refunded. term.order_identifier domain.commerce lifecycle.order order_id Stable identifier for the customer order. term.order_identifier identifier column.sales.order_header.order_id customer_id Customer who placed the order. dimension column.sales.order_header.customer_id order_total_amount Gross order value before any later refund. measure column.sales.order_header.order_total_amount order_created_at Timestamp when the order was created. time_dimension column.sales.order_header.order_created_at identity Each customer order must have a stable order identifier. customer_order.order_id is not null critical

business_entity.payment_refund Payment Refund Payment processor refund transaction created after approval. term.payment_refund domain.payments lifecycle.payment business_entity.refund_decision DERIVES_FROM Payment refund is created from an approved refund decision. payment_refund_id Stable identifier for the payment refund transaction. identifier column.payments.payment_refund.payment_refund_id decision_id Refund decision that authorized the payment refund. identifier column.payments.payment_refund.decision_id business_entity.refund_decision.decision_id REFERENCES Payment Refund decision_id references the approved Refund Decision. refunded_amount Amount sent to the payment provider for refund. term.refund_amount measure column.payments.payment_refund.refunded_amount business_entity.refund_decision.approved_amount RECONCILES_WITH Refunded amount should reconcile with the approved refund amount. payment_status Processor status of the refund transaction. status column.payments.payment_refund.payment_status reconciliation Refunded amount should reconcile to the approved amount for the decision. payment_refund.refunded_amount = refund_decision.approved_amount critical

business_entity.refund_decision Refund Decision Business decision that approves or rejects a refund request. term.approval_status domain.commerce lifecycle.review business_entity.refund_request DERIVES_FROM Refund decision is derived from review of the refund request and policy checks. decision_id Stable identifier for the refund decision. identifier column.support.refund_decision.decision_id refund_request_id Refund request being reviewed. identifier column.support.refund_decision.refund_request_id business_entity.refund_request.refund_request_id REFERENCES Refund Decision refund_request_id references the reviewed Refund Request. approved_amount Amount approved for payment refund. term.refund_amount measure column.support.refund_decision.approved_amount business_entity.refund_request.requested_amount DEPENDS_ON Approved amount is evaluated against the requested refund amount. decision_status Approved or rejected decision state. term.approval_status status column.support.refund_decision.decision_status state_transition Payment refund can be created only for approved decisions. refund_decision.decision_status = 'approved' critical

business_entity.refund_request Refund Request Customer request for a refund against an existing order. term.refund_request domain.commerce lifecycle.refund business_entity.customer_order REFERENCES A refund request references exactly one customer order. refund_request_id Stable identifier for the refund request. identifier column.support.refund_request.refund_request_id order_id Customer order that the refund request belongs to. term.order_identifier identifier column.support.refund_request.order_id business_entity.customer_order.order_id REFERENCES Refund Request order_id references the Customer Order order_id. requested_amount Amount requested by the customer. term.refund_amount measure column.support.refund_request.requested_amount request_status Current lifecycle status of the request. term.approval_status status column.support.refund_request.request_status relationship_required A refund request must reference an existing customer order. refund_request.order_id exists in customer_order.order_id critical
table.payments.payment_refund payment_refund Stores refund transactions submitted to the payment processor.
table.sales.order_header order_header Stores one row per confirmed customer order.
table.support.refund_decision refund_decision Stores review outcomes for refund requests.
table.support.refund_request refund_request Stores customer-submitted refund requests and request status.
term.approval_status Approval Status Review state of a refund request or refund decision.
term.order_identifier Order Identifier Stable identifier assigned to a customer order.
term.payment_refund Payment Refund Payment processor transaction that returns funds to the customer.
term.refund_amount Refund Amount Monetary amount requested or approved for refund.
term.refund_request Refund Request Customer request to return money for an order or order item.
view.analytics.v_refund_lifecycle v_refund_lifecycle Analytics view joining refund requests, review decisions, and payment refund status.
business_entity.customer_order.order_id order_id Stable identifier for the customer order.
business_entity.customer_order.customer_id customer_id Customer who placed the order.
business_entity.customer_order.order_total_amount order_total_amount Gross order value before any later refund.
business_entity.customer_order.order_created_at order_created_at Timestamp when the order was created.
business_entity.payment_refund.payment_refund_id payment_refund_id Stable identifier for the payment refund transaction.
business_entity.payment_refund.decision_id decision_id Refund decision that authorized the payment refund.
business_entity.payment_refund.refunded_amount refunded_amount Amount sent to the payment provider for refund.
business_entity.payment_refund.payment_status payment_status Processor status of the refund transaction.
business_entity.refund_decision.decision_id decision_id Stable identifier for the refund decision.
business_entity.refund_decision.refund_request_id refund_request_id Refund request being reviewed.
business_entity.refund_decision.approved_amount approved_amount Amount approved for payment refund.
business_entity.refund_decision.decision_status decision_status Approved or rejected decision state.
business_entity.refund_request.refund_request_id refund_request_id Stable identifier for the refund request.
business_entity.refund_request.order_id order_id Customer order that the refund request belongs to.
business_entity.refund_request.requested_amount requested_amount Amount requested by the customer.
business_entity.refund_request.request_status request_status Current lifecycle status of the request.
column.payments.payment_refund.payment_refund_id payment_refund_id Primary key for the payment refund transaction.
column.payments.payment_refund.decision_id decision_id Refund decision that authorized the transaction.
column.payments.payment_refund.refunded_amount refunded_amount Amount sent to the payment processor.
column.payments.payment_refund.payment_status payment_status Processor status for the refund transaction.
column.sales.order_header.order_id order_id Primary key for the customer order.
column.sales.order_header.customer_id customer_id Customer identifier on the order.
column.sales.order_header.order_total_amount order_total_amount Gross order amount at checkout.
column.sales.order_header.order_created_at order_created_at Timestamp when the order was confirmed.
column.support.refund_decision.decision_id decision_id Primary key for the refund decision.
column.support.refund_decision.refund_request_id refund_request_id Refund request reviewed by this decision.
column.support.refund_decision.approved_amount approved_amount Approved refund amount when the decision is approved.
column.support.refund_decision.decision_status decision_status Review outcome status.
column.support.refund_request.refund_request_id refund_request_id Primary key for the refund request.
column.support.refund_request.order_id order_id Customer order referenced by the refund request.
column.support.refund_request.requested_amount requested_amount Amount requested by the customer.
column.support.refund_request.request_status request_status Current request status.
column.analytics.v_refund_lifecycle.refund_request_id refund_request_id Refund request identifier selected from refund_request.
column.analytics.v_refund_lifecycle.order_id order_id Order identifier selected from refund_request.
column.analytics.v_refund_lifecycle.requested_amount requested_amount Requested amount selected from refund_request.
column.analytics.v_refund_lifecycle.request_status request_status Request status selected from refund_request.
column.analytics.v_refund_lifecycle.decision_status decision_status Decision status selected from refund_decision.
column.analytics.v_refund_lifecycle.approved_amount approved_amount Approved amount selected from refund_decision.
column.analytics.v_refund_lifecycle.refunded_amount refunded_amount Refunded amount selected from payment_refund.
column.analytics.v_refund_lifecycle.payment_status payment_status Payment processor status selected from payment_refund.
